title: GenomeLens MCscan Pairwise
description: 双物种基础共线性分析子模块。它在两个物种之间完成序列比对、同源锚点筛选和共线性区块识别，得到后续点图、共线性图、核型图和局部共线性分析所需的核心中间结果。
description_en: A foundational pairwise synteny analysis submodule. It performs sequence alignment, homologous anchor filtering, and synteny block discovery between two species, producing the core intermediate results required for downstream dotplots, synteny figures, karyotypes, and local synteny analyses.
context: 适合先建立两个基因组之间的同源与共线性基础关系，再衔接后续图形化与候选位点分析。
context_en: Best used to establish the baseline homologous and syntenic relationships between two genomes before downstream visualization and candidate-locus analysis.

params.label: 输入目录
params.description: 输入两个待比较物种的文件目录。每个物种需按同名前缀成对提供注释与序列文件，用于构建双物种同源搜索与共线性区块识别的原始输入。
params.description_en: Directory containing the two species to compare. Each species should provide matched same-stem annotation and sequence files, which serve as the raw input for pairwise homology search and synteny block detection.

params.label: 最小共线性区块大小
params.description: 保留 block 所需的最小基因数。
params.description_en: Minimum gene count for retained synteny blocks.

params.label: 序列类型
params.description: 序列数据库类型：nucl（核酸）或 prot（蛋白）。
params.description_en: Sequence database type: nucl or prot.

params.label: 共线性锚点最大基因距离
params.description: 共线性锚点间允许的最大基因距离。
params.description_en: Maximum gene distance between synteny anchors.
